issues.description: The script does not appear to implement the requirement to emit 'null' for missing frontmatter fields.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the JSON serialization logic explicitly maps missing keys to null values rather than omitting them.

issues.description: Graceful degradation for malformed frontmatter (emitting 'parse_error: true') is not implemented or verified.
issues.suggestion: Wrap the parsing logic in a try-except block and, upon failure, return a task object with the filename-derived ID and the parse_error flag.

issues.description: The positional TASK-ID argument for single-task lookup and the corresponding error handling (exit 1) is missing.
issues.suggestion: Update the CLI argument parsing to handle an optional positional argument and implement the lookup/exit logic.

issues.description: The test suite is insufficient. Only 3 tests passed, whereas AC-008 requires coverage for empty projects, malformed frontmatter, single-task lookup, and byte-stability.
issues.suggestion: Expand the unit tests in tests/unit/commands/test_task_status_json.py to cover all edge cases specified in the requirements.

criteria_verification.notes: File exists with main() and proper guard.
Recursive scanning of task directories is implemented.
JSON schema and sorting are correct.
No evidence of null emission for missing fields.
No evidence of graceful degradation for malformed frontmatter.
No evidence of single-task lookup via positional argument.
Test suite is incomplete; only 3 tests were run by the orchestrator.
Cannot verify full test suite pass since the suite is incomplete.
Lint/format check results not provided in evidence.

rationale: The core functionality works for the standard case, but the implementation lacks the required error handling, CLI argument support, and comprehensive testing specified in the acceptance criteria.
